title: geranium collae
intro: Geranium collae, also known as New Zealand geranium, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of geranium collae include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of geranium collae, including tinctures and teas, can be made from the plant's leaves and stems, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
